features: SMELL UNCOMMONLY GOOD - This eau de parfum for men is a true sensory experience: a soft, warm, aromatic essence contrasts with a touch of black vanilla and a spicy zest of cardamom in this men's cologne, all for a sweet, woody and vibrant explosion; The sophisticated men's perfume fragrance gradually reveals its different notes; An intense and smooth fragrance with a spicy spirit that awakens your inner adventurer
ASTONISHINGLY SUPERIOR - Our Spice & Black Vanilla perfume for men was thoughtfully designed by our team of world-class scent experts and produced using only the finest ingredients
UNPRETENTIOUS LUXURY - A men's eau de parfum scent you’d expect to find in a high-end boutique without going to a high-end boutique, making it a great gift for men

A FRAGRANCE FOR TODAY'S GENTLEMAN - Men's eau de toilette with spicy notes of cardamom (top notes), tobacco (middle notes) and black vanilla (base notes); Sensual and indulgent, this men's cologne fragrance is the signature of the modern gentleman
SMELL GOOD, FEEL GOOD! Treat yourself to a unique sensory experience for absolute well-being with this men's cologne
description: Product Description MEN'S EAU DE TOILETTE: An aromatic, soft, and warm essence contrasts with a touch of black vanilla and a spicy zest of cardamom in this cologne for men, all for a sweet, woody and vibrant explosion. Sensual, indulgent and enveloping, this men's eau de perfume fragrance, with its relaxed spirit, is the signature of the modern gentleman. Ingredients Alcohol Denat,Aqua,Parfum,Linalool,Limonene,Coumarin,Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone,Citral,Eugenol,Citronellol,Geraniol. Directions Spray your eau de toilette immediately after showering on damp skin. To reveal the full potential of your perfume, spray it inside your wrist (pulsation point that releases heat). Gently touch the other wrist. Dab your neck to prolong the life of your eau de toilette. Men can also spray the eau de toilette on their torso, so that the scent slightly permeates the shirt. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. Keep out of reach of children and pets. For external use only. Do not ingest. Flammable. See more
